case_title: AYELE, GASHAW VS GENTRY, JESSIE JAME AMERICAN HOME SERVICE

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO GENTRY JESSIE JAME OWNER AMERICAN HOME SERVICE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYELE, GASHAW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENTRY, JESSIE JAME AMERICAN HOME SERVICE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,521.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AND REENTERED IN REMARKS TO ALLOW COMPUTER TO ACCEPT SUBSEQUENT ASSIGNMENT FROM REVENUE INVESTIGATION TO AMERICAN JUDGMENTS CORPORATION,
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY AYELE, GASHAW AS TO DEFENDANT GENTRY, JESSIE JAME AMERICAN HOME SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
